Absolute measurement.
Total error is in 4.7-6.9%, including:
Statistical error 4-6%,
Sample weight 1%,
Primary neutron spectrum shape, dead time,
geometry factor, detector efficiency,
less than 0.8% separately,
Neutron fluence attenuation, 0.5% separately,
Angle resolution induced error  1-2.8%
